sys_update_xml.name: sys_security_acl_2c3c2c1d83d33e109fe7c296feaad34e
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="DELETE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Allow read for records in x_1877525_colleg_0_application, for users with roles (x_1877525_colleg_0.admin, x_1877525_colleg_0.student, x_1877525_colleg_0.hr), and if the ACL script returns true.</description><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>x_1877525_colleg_0_application</name><operation display_value="read">read</operation><script><![CDATA[if (gs.hasRole('admin')) {
    answer = true;
} 
else {

    var studentGR = new GlideRecord('x_1877525_colleg_0_student');
    
    if (studentGR.get(current.student)) {
        answer = (studentGR.name == gs.getUserID());
    } 
    else {
        answer = false;
    }

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_2204441d839ffa109fe7c296feaad359
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1877525_colleg_0_application</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>application placed</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

var student = current.student.getRefRecord();

if (student.placement_status == 'Placed') {
    gs.addErrorMessage("Student is already placed.");
    current.setAbortAction(true);
}

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_b7b544858313ba109fe7c296feaad38b
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1877525_colleg_0_application</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>application</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    var student = current.student.getRefRecord();
    var job = current.job.getRefRecord();

    if (!student.isValidRecord() || !job.isValidRecord()) {
        gs.addErrorMessage("Record reference issue.");
        current.setAbortAction(true);
        return;
    }

    var studentCgpa = parseFloat(student.cgpa);
    var jobCgpa = parseFloat(job.eligibility_cgpa);

    if (studentCgpa < jobCgpa) {
        gs.addErrorMessage("You are not eligible");
        current.setAbortAction(true);
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-24 09:41:12</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>b7b544858313ba109fe7c296feaad38b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>7</sys_mod_count><sys_name>application</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="College Placement Tracker" source="x_1877525_colleg_0">736536de838732109fe7c296feaad3ac</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="College Placement Tracker">736536de838732109fe7c296feaad3ac</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_b7b544858313ba109fe7c296feaad38b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-26 04:09:06</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=b7b544858313ba109fe7c296feaad38b"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_security_acl_b60d867b831332109fe7c296feaad394
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description/><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>x_1877525_colleg_0_application</name><operation display_value="read">read</operation><script><![CDATA[if (gs.hasRole('admin')) {
    answer = true;
} else {
    var studentGR = new GlideRecord('x_1877525_colleg_0_student');
    if (studentGR.get(current.student)) {
        answer = studentGR.getValue('name') == gs.getUserID();
    } else {
        answer = false;
    }
}]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-05 08:20:22</sys_created_on><sys_id>b60d867b831332109fe7c296feaad394</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_1877525_colleg_0_application</sys_name><sys_package display_value="College Placement Tracker" source="x_1877525_colleg_0">736536de838732109fe7c296feaad3ac</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="College Placement Tracker">736536de838732109fe7c296feaad3ac</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_b60d867b831332109fe7c296feaad394</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-05 08:20:22</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>
